zh.lifeSummary: Mary Nelson於大約1624年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼。她於1644年12月4日與James Merritt Jr.在英國英格蘭米德萊可斯特普尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼。

nameMeanings.name: Nelson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the personal name Nell or Nele, either of which might be a pet form of Elias or less commonly of Niel (from Latin Nigellus). See also Neal .
Americanized form of Swedish   Nilsson   and also of the Danish, Norwegian, and North German cognates   Nielsen   and   Nilsen   (compare   Nelsen  ). Compare also   Neilson   and   Nielson  .

History: The Nelson name was an important one in 18th-century VA, starting with Thomas ‘Scotch Tom’ Nelson, who emigrated to VA at the close of the 17th century from Penrith, Cumbria, where the Nelsons were numerous. Scotch Tom settled c. 1700 at Yorktown, VA, where he became a successful merchant and landholder. His son was sheriff and a member of the VA Council, and his grandson, Thomas Nelson (1738–89), a signer of the Declaration of Independence, was governor of VA.

variants.name: Nell
meanings: Dutch and German: from the personal name Nel, a shortened form of Cornelius .
South German: nickname from Middle High German nelle ‘crown of the head’, perhaps denoting an obstinate person.

English: from the Middle English personal name Nelle. This may sometimes have been a variant of Nele (Nigellus, see Neal ), but it was probably more often a pet form of the commoner name Elias (see Ellis ) with a prosthetic N-.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: Mary Nelson was born about 1624, in Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom. She married James Merritt Jr. on 4 December 1644, in Stepney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She was buried in Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Nelsonは約1624年にイギリスイギリスロンドンステプニーで生まれた。1644年12月4日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスステプニーでJames Merritt Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスロンドンステプニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Nelson(은)는 대략 1624년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1644년 12월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스테p니에서 James Merritt Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테p니에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Nelson родилась около 1624 г. в местности степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Merritt Jr. 4 декабря 1644 г. в местности степни, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
